/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Werror=date-time -Werror=unguarded-availability-new -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wmissing-field-initializers -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wcovered-switch-default -Wno-noexcept-type -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wdelete-non-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wstring-conversion -Wno-pass-failed -Wmisleading-indentation -Wctad-maybe-unsupported -arch arm64  -Wl,-dead_strip -Wl,-no_warn_duplicate_libraries -Xlinker -flat_namespace -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker suppress -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -Wl,-flat_namespace -Wl,-undefined -Wl,dynamic_lookup -o ../lib/AliasMetaPropagationPlugin.dylib CMakeFiles/AliasMetaPropagationPlugin.dir/AliasMetaPlugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AliasMetaPropagationPlugin.dir/__/lib/MarkAliasGroupsPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AliasMetaPropagationPlugin.dir/__/lib/LowerWithAliasMetaPass.cpp.o   -L/Users/shravansheth/ShravsSSD/llvm-project/build/./lib  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/../lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/shravansheth/ShravsSSD/llvm-project/build/./lib
